title: Add Générateur d'images IA to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Pixels in the classroom
gist.blurb: Someone built a lightweight image generator specifically for teaching AI concepts. It's called Générateur d'images IA, it lives in the Greenhouse now, and it proves you don't need massive models to learn how pixels work.
gist.summary: Added 'Générateur d'images IA' to the community showcase, an educational tool built to demonstrate image generation during AI training.
gist.impact: Users exploring the Greenhouse can check out this lightweight implementation designed specifically for teaching AI concepts.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a French AI image generator used for training and education. Visuals: A cozy classroom or training setting, an easel or chalkboard, the bee mascot wearing a tiny beret (nod to French and art), generating a small pixel picture.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, standing in front of a wooden easel in a sunlit classroom. The easel shows a glowing lime green (#ecf874) canvas with a freshly generated pixel landscape. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, standing in front of a wooden easel in a sunlit classroom. The easel shows a glowing lime green (#ecf874) canvas with a freshly generated pixel landscape. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
